entity.label: Philistia
entity.subtitle: Region
entity.description: '=Palestine (q.v.), “the land of the Philistines” (Ps. 60:8; 87:4; 108:9). The word is supposed to mean “the land of wanderers” or “of strangers.”

nodes.label: Philistia
nodes.description: '=Palestine (q.v.), “the land of the Philistines” (Ps. 60:8; 87:4; 108:9). The word is supposed to mean “the land of wanderers” or “of strangers.”

verses.text: The people shall hear, and be afraid: sorrow shall take hold on the inhabitants of Palestina.
Moab is my washpot; over Edom will I cast out my shoe: Philistia, triumph thou because of me.
I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon to them that know me: behold Philistia, and Tyre, with Ethiopia; this man was born there.
Moab is my washpot; over Edom will I cast out my shoe; over Philistia will I triumph.
Rejoice not thou, whole Palestina, because the rod of him that smote thee is broken: for out of the serpent’s root shall come forth a cockatrice, and his fruit shall be a fiery flying serpent.
Howl, O gate; cry, O city; thou, whole Palestina, art dissolved: for there shall come from the north a smoke, and none shall be alone in his appointed times.
